chunks.text: ources Tasks Tutorials Wiki STARnet Program The TerraSwarm Research Center The TerraSwarm Research Center, launched on January 15, 2013 and ending on December 31, 2017 addressed the huge potential (and associated risks) of pervasive integrat

tial (and associated risks) of pervasive integration of smart, networked sensors and actuators into our connected world. The center was funded by the STARnet phase of the Focus Center Research Program (FCRP) administered by the Semiconductor Resea

am (FCRP) administered by the Semiconductor Research Corporation (SRC). Funding came from the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA) and the SRC industry partners , including GLOBALFOUNDRIES, IBM, Intel Corporation, Micron Technology, R

RIES, IBM, Intel Corporation, Micron Technology, Raytheon, Texas Instruments, and United Technologies. (See About the Center , News , Overview Paper , and Research Highlights .) Recurring Events Thursdays, 12:30-2 (Pacific): Seminar Series , 490 Cory
